hooks.command: sh -lc 'if [ -z "${TMUX_PANE:-}" ]; then exit 0; fi; bin="${BUTMUX_BIN:-butmux}"; if command -v "$bin" >/dev/null 2>&1 || [ -x "$bin" ]; then exec "$bin" hook codex session-start; fi'
sh -lc 'if [ -z "${TMUX_PANE:-}" ]; then exit 0; fi; bin="${BUTMUX_BIN:-butmux}"; if command -v "$bin" >/dev/null 2>&1 || [ -x "$bin" ]; then exec "$bin" hook codex user-prompt-submit; fi'
sh -lc 'if [ -z "${TMUX_PANE:-}" ]; then exit 0; fi; bin="${BUTMUX_BIN:-butmux}"; if command -v "$bin" >/dev/null 2>&1 || [ -x "$bin" ]; then exec "$bin" hook codex stop; fi'
